components.name: Alert
components.description: Contextual feedback message with semantic color variants. Supports optional title, dismissal, and custom icon slot.

variant.description: Visual variant determining border and background color for semantic context

title.description: Optional bold heading displayed above the message content

closable.description: Show a dismiss button that triggers onClose when clicked

onClose.description: Callback fired when the dismiss button is clicked

children.description: Message content displayed in the alert body

icon.description: Optional custom icon overriding the default variant icon

examples.name: Default alert
examples.code: <Alert>Something happened that you should know about.</Alert>

examples.name: Closable
examples.code: <Alert closable onClose={() => setVisible(false)}>Dismiss me when ready.</Alert>

examples.name: With title
examples.code: <Alert variant="error" title="Payment failed">Your card was declined. Please update your billing details.</Alert>

components.name: AlertDialog
components.description: Destructive action confirmation dialog. Requires explicit confirm/cancel response before dismissal.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when dialog opens or closes

components.name: AppWindow
components.description: Desktop-style application window with draggable chrome, optional resize handles, and mobile/fullscreen presentations.

id.description: Stable window identifier used for aria and share-link behavior.

title.description: Window title shown in the title bar.

open.description: Whether the window is currently rendered.

resizable.description: Enables resize handles in desktop window presentation.

presentation.description: Selects windowed, fullscreen, or mobile shell presentation.

children.description: Window content. Supports compound children (AppWindow.Nav, AppWindow.Toolbar, AppWindow.Content) or bare children for backward compat.

AppWindow.Nav.description: Chrome-level tab navigation rendered in the title bar zone. Wraps Nav.Item children. Props: value, onChange, layout (capsule).

AppWindow.Toolbar.description: Optional control bar between title bar and content. Accepts arbitrary ReactNode (search, filters, sub-tabs). Works with or without Nav.

AppWindow.Content.description: Content area wrapper with layout modes. Props: layout ('single' | 'split' | 'sidebar' | 'bleed'). Use with Island children for structured layouts. Layout guidance: 'single' (default) — most apps, one scrollable content card; 'split' — side-by-side comparison or equal-weight dual panels; 'sidebar' — fixed nav + flexible content (docs, settings with sections); 'bleed' — full-window content with no card treatment (media players, editorial/pretext layouts, canvas apps). Note: if Content renders inside a flex parent with items-start (e.g. Tabs with layout='sidebar'), add className='w-full' to ensure it fills available width.

AppWindow.Island.description: Scrollable content region inside Content. Props: padding ('none' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), bgClassName, noScroll, corners ('standard' | 'pixel' | 'none'), width, className. Default padding is 'sm' (p-2 = 8px), matching the Content gutter (px-1.5 pb-1.5 = 6px) and inter-island gap (gap-1.5 = 6px). Use 'lg' for long-form text content that needs breathing room. When an Island is used as a sidebar navigation container (tab list, nav menu), use corners='none' — nav containers are layout slots, not visual card surfaces.

AppWindow.Banner.description: Fixed non-scrolling banner area above Content islands. Useful for status bars, alerts, or sticky headers.

examples.name: Compound: Nav + Toolbar + Content
examples.code:
<AppWindow id="assets" title="Brand Assets">
  <AppWindow.Nav value={tab} onChange={setTab}>
    <AppWindow.Nav.Item value="logos" icon={<Icon name="image" />}>Logos</AppWindow.Nav.Item>
    <AppWindow.Nav.Item value="color" icon={<Icon name="palette" />}>Color</AppWindow.Nav.Item>
  </AppWindow.Nav>
  <AppWindow.Toolbar>
    <Input placeholder="Search..." />
  </AppWindow.Toolbar>
  <AppWindow.Content>
    {/* tab content */}
  </AppWindow.Content>
</AppWindow>

examples.name: Content island with sidebar layout
examples.description: Two-pane layout with fixed-width sidebar nav (corners='none') and flexible main area.
examples.code:
<AppWindow id="docs" title="Documentation">
  <AppWindow.Content layout="sidebar">
    <AppWindow.Island width="w-48" padding="none" corners="none" noScroll>
      <nav>Sidebar nav</nav>
    </AppWindow.Island>
    <AppWindow.Island padding="lg">
      <article>Long-form main content</article>
    </AppWindow.Island>
  </AppWindow.Content>
</AppWindow>

components.name: Avatar
components.description: User profile image with automatic fallback to initials when the image is unavailable or not provided.

src.description: URL of the avatar image. Falls back to initials when omitted or fails to load.

alt.description: Accessible alt text for the avatar image

fallback.description: Initials or short text shown when the image is unavailable

size.description: Size preset controlling width, height, and text size

components.name: Badge
components.description: Status indicator and label component with semantic color variants.

variant.description: Visual variant determining background color for status indication

size.description: Size preset controlling padding and text size

components.name: Breadcrumbs
components.description: Hierarchical navigation trail showing the current page location within the site structure.

items.description: Ordered list of breadcrumb items, each with a label and optional href

separator.description: Character or string rendered between breadcrumb items

className.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the breadcrumb container

items.description: Breadcrumb item nodes when composing manually

examples.name: Basic breadcrumbs
examples.code: <Breadcrumbs items={[{ label: "Home", href: "/" }, { label: "Settings", href: "/settings" }, { label: "Profile" }]} />

examples.name: Custom separator
examples.code: <Breadcrumbs separator="›" items={[{ label: "Home", href: "/" }, { label: "Docs", href: "/docs" }, { label: "API" }]} />

components.name: Button
components.description: Action trigger with retro pixel-corner lift effect. Built on Base UI Button primitive. Supports button and link behaviors.

mode.description: Visual mode. For destructive actions, use mode="solid" tone="danger".

tone.description: Color tone — controls bg, border, and text color via data-color attribute

size.description: Size preset controlling height, padding, and text size

fullWidth.description: Expand button to fill container width

active.description: Toggled active state (e.g. app is open in taskbar)

iconOnly.description: Square button showing only the icon

textOnly.description: Text-only button — suppresses icon slot and leader line

flush.description: Negative margins cancel padding for flush alignment with surroundings

quiet.description: Transparent at rest — strips fill and border, re-applies on hover/active/selected

compact.description: Compact badge-like styling using mono font (PixelCode)

focusableWhenDisabled.description: Keep tab focus when disabled (uses aria-disabled instead of native disabled)

href.description: URL for link navigation. Renders as anchor element when provided.

icon.description: Icon — RDNA icon name (string) or custom ReactNode. Renders right of text with a leader line separator.

components.name: Card
components.description: Container with retro pixel-corner bevels and theme-owned colors. Use CardHeader, CardBody, CardFooter for structured layouts.

variant.description: Visual variant controlling background and bevel treatment

children.description: Card content. Use CardHeader, CardBody, CardFooter sub-components for structured layouts, or pass content directly with padding via className.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Retro-styled checkbox and radio components for form selections. Provides accessible input controls with visual feedback states.

label.description: Label text displayed next to the input

defaultChecked.description: Initial checked state for uncontrolled usage

components.name: Collapsible
components.description: Expandable content section with animated transition. Triggered by a designated trigger element.

defaultOpen.description: Initial expanded state for uncontrolled usage

replaces.note: Use Collapsible.Trigger for the summary surface

components.name: Combobox
components.description: Searchable select / autocomplete input. Combines a text input with a filterable dropdown list. Supports keyboard navigation, custom filtering, groups, and empty states.

defaultValue.description: Default selected value for uncontrolled usage

autoHighlight.description: Whether the first matching item is highlighted automatically

children.description: Combobox.Input and Combobox.Portal wrapping Combobox.Popup with Combobox.Item children

examples.name: Basic combobox
examples.code:
<Combobox.Root>
  <Combobox.Input placeholder="Search frameworks..." />
  <Combobox.Portal>
    <Combobox.Popup>
      <Combobox.Item value="react">React</Combobox.Item>
      <Combobox.Item value="vue">Vue</Combobox.Item>
      <Combobox.Empty>No results found</Combobox.Empty>
    </Combobox.Popup>
  </Combobox.Portal>
</Combobox.Root>

components.name: ContextMenu
components.description: Right-click context menu with keyboard navigation support.

components.name: CountdownTimer
components.description: Live countdown display with days, hours, minutes, and seconds. Supports multiple visual variants.

endTime.description: Target end time as Unix ms timestamp (number) or ISO 8601 date string (Date objects accepted at runtime)

startTime.description: Optional start time as Unix ms timestamp (number) or ISO 8601 date string (Date objects accepted at runtime)

onComplete.description: Callback fired when countdown reaches zero

showDays.description: Show the days unit in the display

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal dialog with focus trap and overlay. Provides accessible dialog interactions through compound components.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when dialog opens or closes

components.name: Drawer
components.description: Slide-in panel anchored to a viewport edge. Dismissable by clicking the overlay or pressing Escape.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when drawer opens or closes

direction.description: Which edge the drawer slides from

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.description: Dropdown menu triggered by a button or icon. Supports keyboard navigation, separators, and nested items.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when menu opens or closes

position.description: Preferred menu placement relative to trigger

components.name: Icon
components.description: Dynamic SVG icon loader with dual-size support. Loads pixel-art icons (16px) or detailed icons (24px) based on size, with automatic name translation between sets via the size map.

name.description: Icon name (filename without .svg). Aliases like 'search', 'home', 'trash' resolve automatically.

size.description: Render size in pixels. Also determines icon set: ≤20 → 16px, >20 → 24px.

iconSet.description: Force a specific icon set regardless of size. Overrides the automatic size-based selection.

className.description: CSS classes for styling. Use text-* classes for color.

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input with semantic token styling. Works standalone or as a compound component with Input.Root for accessible form fields with labels, descriptions, and validation.

size.description: Size preset for input height and padding

error.description: Shows error state styling (standalone mode only)

fullWidth.description: Makes input take full container width

iconName.description: Icon name for leading icon slot

Root.description: Accessible form field wrapper (Base UI Field.Root)

Label.description: Auto-wired label with optional required indicator

Description.description: Help text displayed below the control

Error.description: Error message displayed when the field is invalid

Validity.description: Render prop exposing native validity state

examples.name: Accessible form field
examples.code:
<Input.Root>
  <Input.Label required>Email</Input.Label>
  <Input type="email" placeholder="you@example.com" />
  <Input.Description>We'll never share your email.</Input.Description>
  <Input.Error>Enter a valid email.</Input.Error>
</Input.Root>

components.name: InputSet
components.description: Groups related form fields with a legend, providing accessible form grouping via Base UI Fieldset.

disabled.description: Whether all fields within the group are disabled

Legend.description: Heading text for the field group

components.name: Menubar
components.description: Desktop-style application menu bar with keyboard navigation and nested menus.

components.name: Meter
components.description: Gauge component for displaying a scalar measurement within a known range. Maps to the HTML meter element semantics.

low.description: Value below which the range is considered low

high.description: Value above which the range is considered high

optimum.description: The optimum or ideal value within the range

replaces.note: Use Meter for progress indicators in v1

components.name: NavigationMenu
components.description: Site navigation component with flyout content panels. Supports horizontal and vertical orientations.

components.name: NumberField
components.description: Numeric input with increment/decrement buttons and optional scrub-to-adjust. Wraps Base UI NumberField for accessible numeric entry.

disabled.description: Whether the number field is disabled

Increment.description: Button to increase the value by step

Decrement.description: Button to decrease the value by step

Group.description: Container grouping decrement, input, and increment

ScrubArea.description: Drag-to-adjust area for fine value control

components.name: Pattern
components.description: Renders a recolorable 8x8 tiling pattern from the System 6 pattern library. Uses CSS mask-image so any color paints through the pattern shape.

color.description: Dot/foreground color. Any CSS color value. Defaults to var(--color-main)

bg.description: Background color behind the pattern. Defaults to transparent (overlay mode)

children.description: Content rendered on top of the pattern (when using bg mode)

components.name: Popover
components.description: Floating panel anchored to a trigger element. Supports keyboard navigation and focus management.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when popover opens or closes

position.description: Preferred popover placement relative to trigger

components.name: PreviewCard
components.description: Hover-triggered floating card for rich content previews. Appears on hover with a configurable delay.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when card opens or closes

components.name: Radio
components.description: Retro-styled radio button with pixel-art dot indicator. Uses Base UI Radio internally for accessibility.

label.description: Label text displayed next to the radio

name.description: Input name for form submission (groups radios together)

examples.name: Radio group
examples.code:
<>
  <Radio label="Small" name="size" value="sm" />
  <Radio label="Medium" name="size" value="md" checked />
  <Radio label="Large" name="size" value="lg" />
</>

components.name: ScrollArea
components.description: Custom scrollable container with styled scrollbars. Provides consistent scroll UI across browsers.

orientation.description: Scroll direction: horizontal, vertical, or both

type.description: Scrollbar visibility behavior: auto, always, scroll, hover

components.name: Select
components.description: Custom dropdown select with retro styling. Provides a fully accessible select experience with keyboard navigation and customizable states.

options.description: Array of option objects with value, label, and optional disabled properties

placeholder.description: Placeholder text when no value is selected

error.description: Show error state with red border

fullWidth.description: Expand select to fill container width

examples.name: Basic select
examples.code: <Select options={[{value: "a", label: "Option A"}, {value: "b", label: "Option B"}]} value={selected} onChange={setSelected} />

components.name: Separator
components.description: Accessible separator element for visually dividing content sections. Supports solid, dashed, and decorated (diamond ornament) variants.

variant.description: Visual style of the separator line

components.name: Sheet
components.description: Side panel that slides in from a viewport edge. Similar to Drawer but typically full-height.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when sheet opens or closes

side.description: Which edge the sheet slides from

components.name: Slider
components.description: Numeric range input with draggable thumb. Supports keyboard navigation and customizable sizes.

size.description: Size preset controlling track height and thumb dimensions

showValue.description: Display current value next to label

label.description: Label text displayed above the slider

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Animated loading indicator with two display modes: a classic rotating spinner and a dot-pulse animation. Accepts a completed state to signal task completion.

variant.description: Animation style — rotating ring or pulsing dots

size.description: Diameter of the spinner in pixels

completed.description: When true, renders a completion state instead of animating

components.name: Switch
components.description: On/off toggle control for binary settings. Provides accessible switch interaction with customizable sizes and optional label.

checked.description: Controlled checked state of the switch

size.description: Size preset controlling track and thumb dimensions

label.description: Optional label text for the switch

labelPosition.description: Position of label relative to switch

id.description: ID for accessibility linking between label and switch

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Accessible tabbed navigation with keyboard support. Supports pill and line visual variants.

mode.description: Visual mode — controls trigger fill treatment

layout.description: Arrangement of tab list relative to content panels

components.name: TextArea
components.description: Multi-line text input with semantic token styling. Shares visual language with Input.

fullWidth.description: Makes textarea take full container width

components.name: Toast
components.description: Ephemeral notification that appears and disappears automatically. Supports variants and can be triggered imperatively via useToast.

variant.description: Visual style: default, success, warning, error

icon.description: Icon name to display alongside the toast

examples.name: Basic toast usage
examples.code:
const { toast } = useToast();
toast({ title: "Saved", description: "Your changes have been saved." });

examples.name: Error toast
examples.code: toast({ title: "Error", variant: "error", description: "Something went wrong." });

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Pressable toggle button that holds a pressed/unpressed state. Used as standalone or inside ToggleGroup.

defaultPressed.description: Initial pressed state for uncontrolled usage

components.name: ToggleGroup
components.description: Group of related toggle buttons for single or multiple selection. Items render as RDNA Toggles, inheriting the full Button visual system.

multiple.description: Allow multiple items to be selected simultaneously

tone.description: Color tone: accent, danger, success, neutral, cream, white, info, tinted

size.description: Size applied to all toggle items: sm, md, lg

rounded.description: Pixel-corner roundness for items: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, none

quiet.description: Transparent at rest — fills on hover/selected

compact.description: Compact badge-like styling — uses mono font

components.name: Toolbar
components.description: Accessible toolbar container with keyboard navigation between interactive elements.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: A floating label that appears on hover or focus of a trigger element. Supports four placement directions, configurable show delay, and three size variants.

content.description: Text or element displayed inside the tooltip bubble

position.description: Which side of the trigger the tooltip appears on

delay.description: Milliseconds to wait before showing the tooltip

size.description: Controls padding and font size of the tooltip bubble

className.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the trigger wrapper

children.description: Trigger element — the tooltip appears relative to this node

content.description: Tooltip bubble content, passed via the content prop
